publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-04-17 23:50:15 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Original photographs, glass plates and other negatives, glossy prints.
did.abstract: Original photographs, glass plates and other negatives, and glossy prints, mainly of the New York, Ontario, and Western Railway, taken by Mr. Diver and others in Delaware, Madison, Oneida, Oswego, Otsego, and Sullivan Counties, New York.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: A collection of DeForest Douglas Diver, 1878-1958, railroad engineer and photographer, consisting of original photographs, glass plates and other negatives, and glossy prints, mainly of the New York, Ontario, and Western Railway. Subjects include employee groups, locomotives, passenger and freight cars, stations at Middletown and elsewhere, roundhouse and yards at Middleton, flooded and snowbound tracks, construction work and heavy equipment, the Hawk Mountain tunnel, and various wrecks. Photographs were taken by Mr. Diver and others at Cadosia, Cooks Falls, Fishs Eddy, Sidney, Delaware County; Morrisville, Oneida, Randallsville, Solsville, Madison County; Clinton, Oneida County; Constantia, Fulton, Oswego County; South New Berlin, Otsego County; Callicoon, Ferndale, Hankins, Hurleyville, Liberty, Summitville, Sullivan County.

list.head: List of N.Y.O. & W. engines usually with a coal car in the Diver RR Collection, glossy print and glass plate of each; compiled by N. Dean, 4-6-66. In Box [ ] unless noted otherwise.Engine #
List of N.Y.O. & W. vestibule chair (passenger) cars in the Diver RR Collection, glossy print and glass plate of each; compiled by N. Dean, 4-6-66.Vestibule chair cars #
List of boxcar photographs in the Diver RR Collection; compiled by N. Dean, 2/25/64

defitem.label: One boxcar in background; # impossible to read.
Long line of boxcars at station; # impossible to read; incl. Lehigh Valley car; neg. # 40.
N.Y.O. & W. engine 360 and boxcar (?) 15432; neg. #E17.
Train on track; engine, boxcar, and 2 passenger cars; no numbers [797 on back of picture].
N.Y.O. & W. boxcar 9257 at great distance.
N.Y.O. & W. boxcar 9623 with engine 362; neg. #E16.
N.Y.O. & W. boxcar 9584 [incorrectly captioned as "91 - Buell Brothers' Taxicab, Norwich, N.Y."].

odd.head: Additional information on contents of Diver RR Photograph Collection

list.item: Negative and print of picture of inspection locomotive #28 made, June 26, 1963; print sent of Lucius Beebe (see general corres. file) and negative filed in collection.
Collection does NOT include a picture of inspection locomotive #28 (see letter from Leonard Rice, 9/7/63).
For checklist of boxcar photos made 2/64, see attached list.
For checklist of N.Y.O. & W. engine and vestibule chair car photos made 4/66, see attached list.

odd.head: Additional Description
odd.p: Report of the Curator and Archivist, 1958-62

altformavail.head: Available Copies:
altformavail.p: Photographs from the collection have been digitized and are accessible through Cornell Library's Flickr site: http://www.flickr.com/photos/cornelluniversitylibrary/collections/72157621733952250/ .
Photographs from the collection are also accessible through the RMC image portal..

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: DeForest Douglas Diver Railroad Photographs, #1948. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.abstract: (No negative; discrepancy between proof and cover photo)
